title: Recubrimientos para pisos industriales para talleres automotrices y concesionarios de automĂłviles - Elite Mexico
content:
Automotive
The automotive industry has many different flooring needs such as high durability requirements for production and service areas as well as aesthetic value for showrooms. Our easy to maintain surfaces are abrasion resistant and slip resistant even when wet. These protective coatings are resistant to petrochemicals, de-icing salts and other corrosives.
Advantages
Impact and abrasion resistant
Slip resistant in wet or dry conditions for pedestrian and vehicular safety
Resistant to damage from petrochemicals, de-icing salts and other corrosives
Quick install options for minimal downtime
Suitable for high automobile traffic and other heavy machinery
Easy to clean and maintain
Options for line striping, directional arrows and safety markings
For new construction and existing surfaces in need of repair and/or protection
Extreme temperature resistances including freeze/thaw conditions and extreme heat
Custom colors to match company colors, logos and branding themes
Cove/Cant Base
Service departments
Car parking decks
Commercial garages
Assembly lines and plants
Car washes & detail shops
Maintenance shops
Body shops & painting facilities
Warehouses
Showrooms
Cove/Cant Base
